reviews.review_description: Sooo I was playing and people were doing a glitch and I didn’t know it was a glitch so I tried it and a moderater was banning everyone in a lobby/CYLO oh and there were like 4 people doing the glitch too

Cool game btw if y’all gonna write a review 
then don’t beg for mod 🙄

The game is a lil glitchy sometimes and sometime the moderators ban you for no reason but other wise the game has a lot of mod menus and the games physics are really smooth and the the steam long arms so  smooth my honest opinion is that this game is really nice and you should check it out for yourself
Moder banned me for saying dumb

I just came from Down from tutorial and was about to change my name from gorilla to Cmart and a mod banned me and a lot of other new players DO NOT GET GAME THE MODS ARE HORRIBLE
￼

￼ OK first of all the game is really glitchy whenever I’m out in forest only but I feel like I would be a really good moderator because I haven’t got banned or reported yet and I haven’t been being bad or anything like that but this game is really fun. It has a lot of mod menus and stuff like that. I really recommend this game. It’s probably my favorite game and it also has custom maps that you can go to in very cool cosmetics get this game now!￼

So first you spawn in tutorial or stump you will see a cosmetic changer and on top of it says "Modded wardrobe" When you click that you will see custom skins. Under materials their is menus and their are are about 7 mod menus. Then a little bit on the right their was a scavenger hunt and its hard. After their is this cosmetic mod that you can press and the other one is private. Also their is a custom map mod that only has 4 maps. It takes a long time to load in the lobbys. In city their is lots and lots of cosmetics I also like how their is so many and a trusted user thingy. And to top it of you only get 5000 shiny rocks to start off. So overall I give this game a 3 star rating.
Amazing game highly recommend it also for competitive people/zen tag or fast gorillas I would be an amazing mod not forcing tho
super fun good community no toxicity also plz moderator
So a moderator ban me cause I reported some one that was using illegal mods and saying bad words but I would be a very good moderator for the community but I’m banned right now
